topic: Find specific, numerical financial benchmarks for: 'AI-Powered Oceanic Compute Hubs (AOCH): Capitalizing on the trend of integrating data centers with renewable energy sources like offshore wind turbines, AOCH will establish AI-optimized compute clusters within these offshore energy platforms. This concept tackles the immense power and space demands of AI, offering a sustainable, off-grid solution that utilizes natural ocean cooling and co-located renewable energy, thereby addressing the growing enterprise need for scalable and environmentally responsible AI infrastructure.'. Provide exact CAPEX costs, average OPEX salaries, current unit/commodity prices, and recent funding valuations in this sector. Cite sources.
